description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named emscripten that runs on push and pull request to the master branch. The workflow has two jobs: build and deploy. The build job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with archlinux:base-devel, installs dependencies, sets up emscripten, checks out the code, builds a profiler GUI, compresses artifacts, and uploads them. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the build job, and deploys the artifacts to a remote server using SFTP.
